keyPointsSummary: 'Must have' expresses strong logical certainty about something in the past
Not used for obligation in the past — only certainty/deduction

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: He must have worked very hard.
They must have made a mistake.
She must have told the truth.

quickQuiz.hindi: हमने जरूर देर कर दी होगी।
उसने जरूर यह किताब पढ़ी होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: He must have read this book.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह जरूर बहुत खुश हुई होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: She must have been very happy.

quickQuiz.hindi: उन्होंने जरूर बहुत पैसे खर्च किए होंगे।
quickQuiz.answer: They must have spent a lot of money.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने जरूर मुझे फोन किया होगा।

mustRememberRules: 'Must have' expresses strong logical certainty about something in the past
Not used for obligation in the past — only certainty/deduction
